name: Arif Hossain
bio: We met in high school and used to play cricket in the field almost every Friday after class.

name: Nusrat Jahan
bio: We worked on the same group assignments at university and often grabbed coffee to talk about careers.

name: Rafiq Ahmed
bio: He was my team lead at my previous company; we once shipped a release together the night before a deadline.

name: Samira Karim
bio: My cousin on my father's side; the whole family got together at our grandfather's house last Eid and we reconnected.

name: Imran Siddique
bio: Lives in the same building; we often run into each other at the gym and swap quick workout tips.

name: Farhana Chowdhury
bio: She mentored me on UI design and reviewed my portfolio when I was preparing for my first interviews.

name: Tanvir Islam
bio: We were batchmates in a web dev course and ended up on the same hackathon team; we still talk about open source.

name: Mahmudul Hasan
bio: Childhood friend from our neighborhood; he is into photography now and sometimes invites me on weekend photo walks.

name: Priya Sengupta
bio: We met in a book club; once a month we debate endings and spoilers way longer than we should.

name: Sabbina Rahman
bio: We used to play football together during college breaks and often hung out at the local মাঠ.

name: Jannatul Ferdous
bio: She helped me a lot during my onboarding process at my first job and always checks in on my progress.

name: Rahena Hasan
bio: One of my early freelance clients; we worked on a website project and still keep in touch occasionally.
